summary: Adjusted the opening to enter through Marisol's immediate physical presence instead of another institution-first setup, and sharpened the closing handoff toward the inquiry without changing chapter beats or voice.
edits: Reframed the opening paragraph around Marisol worrying her visitor badge so Chapter 17 opens on a distinct scaffold from Chapter 18 while preserving the hospital aftermath details.
Added a brief inquiry-facing clause near the close to make Gabriel's decision to stay feed more cleanly into the next chapter's hearing scene.
